title: Brazil Ke Forests
excerpt: Google ne Brazilian government ke saath milkar ek naye satellite imagery map par kaam kiya hai, jiska uddeshya Brazil ke forests ko surakshit rakhna hai. Is project mein AI aur satellite technology ka upyog kiya gaya hai. Bharteey paripreksya mein bhi yeh project mahatvpoorna hai, kyunki humare desh mein bhi vanaspati vinash aur paryavaran sanrakshan ek badi chunauti hai.
content:
Brazil ke forests ko surakshit rakhne ke liye Google ne ek naya satellite imagery map banaya hai. Is project mein Google ne Brazilian government ke saath milkar kaam kiya hai, jiska uddeshya Brazil ke forests ko surakshit rakhna hai. Is project mein AI aur satellite technology ka upyog kiya gaya hai, jisse forest ki nigraani aur sanrakshan mein madad milegi.

 Is project ke tahat, Google ne apne satellite imagery platform ko upyog mein laya hai, jisse Brazil ke forests ki high-resolution images prapt ki ja sakti hain. In images ka upyog karke, forest ki sthiti ka pata lagaya ja sakta hai, jaise ki vanaspati vinash, jungle ki aag, aur anya prakar ke nuksan. Isse Brazilian government ko forest ki nigraani aur sanrakshan mein madad milegi.

 Bharteey paripreksya mein bhi yeh project mahatvpoorna hai, kyunki humare desh mein bhi vanaspati vinash aur paryavaran sanrakshan ek badi chunauti hai. Hamare desh mein bhi AI aur satellite technology ka upyog karke forest ki nigraani aur sanrakshan mein madad mil sakti hai. Iske liye, humare desh ki sarkar ko bhi AI aur satellite technology ko apnana hoga, jisse hamare desh ke forests ko surakshit rakhne mein madad milegi.

 Is project ke liye, Google ne apne AI algorithms ko upyog mein laya hai, jisse satellite images ko analyze kiya ja sakta hai. Isse forest ki sthiti ka pata lagaya ja sakta hai, aur yeh bhi pata lagaya ja sakta hai ki kaunse areas mein sabse zyada vanaspati vinash ho raha hai. Isse Brazilian government ko forest ki nigraani aur sanrakshan mein madad milegi, aur yeh project Brazil ke forests ko surakshit rakhne mein mahatvpoorna bhoomika nibhayega.
